title: Source Engine Soundpack
description: Sounds from Source Engine games in your copy of Minecraft!
body:
## What?
A sound resource pack that adds sound effects from some Source Engine games published by Valve, mainly Half-Life 2.

## What's included?
- Common footstep sounds
  - (Not every footstep sound has changed.)
- Common player sounds
  - Standard damage sound
  - Death sound (No, not the flatline one. Sorry.)
  - Drowning
  - Burning
- Ambient sounds
  - Being underwater & swimming
- Other sound effects...
  - Explosions
  - Bows & arrows
